# ElleonorAI — Dragon & Heroes

> NFT fantasy card game on NEAR Protocol. Collect heroes and dragons, battle in dungeons, trade cards, and earn while you play.

ElleonorAI is a play-to-earn card game where players collect NFT heroes and dragons on the NEAR blockchain, build teams, and fight through procedurally generated dungeons and PvP battles. The game is wallet-gated — most surfaces are accessible only after connecting a NEAR wallet.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page that routes visitors to the auth screen.
- [Connect Wallet](/auth): Sign in with a NEAR wallet or enter as a guest to explore.
